历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10819 → 11542 → 11044 → 8243 → 7935. After a slight backward shift in 2022, it has moved forward significantly for two consecutive years since 2024 (ranking number decreasing), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3600 places in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7935. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 176 in 2021, 173 in 2022, 171 in 2023, 186 in 2024, and 200 in 2025, showing a steady expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 190, a reduction of 10 (-5%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising: 50th in 2021 → 53rd in 2022 → 49th in 2023 → 45th in 2024 → 43rd in 2025 → 43rd in 2026. The ranking has improved steadily in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, there were no obvious negative events in reputation evaluation, overall stable and positive. Douyin popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.72 million. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended national defense specialty majors such as Underwater Acoustic Engineering. The identity of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' continues to attract attention, with high application enthusiasm. Control Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation). National defense specialty disciplines such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustic Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology have outstanding strength, highly correlated with enrollment majors, and have strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are all highly recommended popular majors, with social popularity continuing to rise. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 143,600, basically the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-5%), the steady rise in Soft Science ranking, and the popularity boost from the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' identity, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 7935. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7647, with a range of 7147–8147.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 7647, range 7147–8147. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (national defense specialty majors such as Underwater Acoustic Engineering, Nuclear Engineering, Ocean Engineering, etc.), while Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Software Engineering, Electronic Information) can be attempted as reach options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 7147), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. For rankings near the upper bound of the range (around 8147), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
